title: alisma gramineum subsp. arcuatum
intro: Alisma gramineum subsp. arcuatum, also known as the curved-leaf water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Alismataceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Alisma gramineum subsp. arcuatum include its ability to treat conditions such as edema, hypertension, and urinary disorders, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Alisma gramineum subsp. arcuatum is often dried and made into capsules, tablets, or teas for medicinal use.
